name: Fresh Tripe Soup
shortDesc: Fresh beef tripe simmered daily with an egg yolk and garlic cream sauce — a classic traditional tripe soup
metaDesc: Çorbacı fresh tripe soup. Prepared daily with natural ingredients in traditional style.
keywords: fresh tripe soup, iskembe, traditional tripe, corbaci soup
longDesc: Fresh beef tripe is carefully cleaned and simmered for a long time with garlic, onion and salt
An egg yolk and lemon sauce gives the soup its creamy, velvety texture
Contains no additives — made from fresh tripe, natural spices and daily-prepared ingredients
Serve hot topped with sizzling butter, red pepper flakes, garlic and vinegar for the full depth of flavour
Rich in protein, satisfying and nourishing — the timeless traditional treat for mornings and cold days
